name: Bow Ties and Broccoli Alfredo
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Uncooked bow tie pasta (3 cups)
1/2 cup Sliced roasted red bell peppers (from 7.25 oz jar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.
Cook the pasta until desired doneness, as directed on the package,
adding broccoli during the last 2 to 3 minutes of cooking time.
Drain thoroughly.
2. In the greased casserole dish, combine all ingredients except
cheese; mix well.
3. Cover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
4. Uncover the casserole; sprinkle with cheese.
5. Bake, uncovered, an additional 5 to 10 minutes or until cheese is light golden brown.
Nutritional Information Per Serving:
420 Calories, 24 g Fat, 370 mg Sodium
